Buse Nur MARAL is a research assistant in the English Language Teaching (ELT) Program at İstanbul 29 Mayıs University, Faculty of Education, Department of Foreign Language Education. She received her B.A. in English Language Teaching from Yıldız Technical University, Faculty of Education, Department of Foreign Language Education. After graduating, she worked as an English as a Foreign Langauge (EFL) instructor at Nişantaşı University and Maltepe University. She is currently doing her Master’s in ELT (with thesis) at Maltepe University, and has a project supported by the TÜBİTAK 2209 – University Students’ Research Support Program. Her main interests are self-efficacy and speaking skills.
